title: TNT Sulfur Cubes
description: Most feature-rich implementation of explosive Sulfur Cubes!
body:
# Replaced by Vanilla Feature
> TNT in Sulfur Cubes has been added to vanilla in 26.2 Snapshot 5.

# TNT Sulfur Cubes

The most feature-rich implementation of TNT in Sulfur Cubes!

## Features

- Sulfur Cubes can now absorb TNT
- They explode on impact with blocks or other mobs (More speed = Bigger explosion)
- You can also light them with Flint and Steel or a Fire Charge like normal TNT

## Gamerules

You can disable explosions on impact, only leaving igniting with tools:

```mcfunction
/gamerule tntsulfurcubes:explode_on_impact false
```

Or configure the speed that is required for explosion / explosion impact:
```mcfunction
/gamerule tntsulfurcubes:impact_explosion_min_speed
/gamerule tntsulfurcubes:impact_explosion_power
```
